title: Secure research/education partner (university math/CS dept or distributed-computing project)
context: bigger-pi is an open, distributed, verification-first effort to compute more digits of pi on donated compute; the public good is the open, reproducible, independently-verified toolchain, chunk-coordination protocol, and provenance ledger. Per the project's honest default, verifiedNeed stays false and requestor stays TBD until a named research/education or distributed-computing org confirms need/interest in writing; this task secures that partner. The absence of a partner does not strand the already-shipped public good.
objective: Secure a named research/education or distributed-computing partner who confirms need/interest in writing.
acceptanceCriteria: A named research/education or distributed-computing org confirms need/interest in writing.
On success, verifiedNeed flips to true and requestor is set to the named org across the project's tasks.
output: A document recording the secured partner and their written confirmation of need/interest.
